desc: Elegant 5-bed colonial with brick front on wooded lot adjacent to Holmdel Park. Two-story entry foyer, gourmet kitchen with granite and custom maple cabinetry, magnificent master suite. Close to NYC bus, train & ferry.
description:
Elegant 5-bedroom Colonial with a striking brick front, set on a wooded lot adjacent to the scenic Holmdel Park. This refined home offers gracious living spaces throughout.

The dramatic two-story entry foyer creates a grand first impression. The gourmet kitchen is appointed with granite countertops and custom maple cabinetry — a chef's dream. The magnificent master suite provides a private retreat.

Exceptional commuter access with NYC bus, NJ Transit train, and NY Waterway ferry all nearby.
